title: DinoBriks Rum
description: A simple brewery datapack that adds 80+ new drinks! Craft and age drinks!
body:
![DinoBrik’s Rum Brewery Datapack for Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/babd781eb51a9bc419e8ce2b648dfb6ba3757f70.png)

---
[Info Video](https://youtu.be/llIDGSiUq_c)
---

Discord also has alot of info that isn't here, like MEAD!

# USING DATAPACK VERSION IS RECOMMENDED OVER MOD

## 🍷 Features  
- **80+ Custom Drinks**: Rum, Whiskey, Wine, Beer, Vodka, Absinthe, Tequila, and many variants of them!
- **Ferment, Distill, and Age**: Use cauldrons, barrels, and ingredients to brew high-quality drinks. 
- **Star Rating System**: Perfect your distillation timing to get up to 5-star brews.  
- **Aging Barrels**: Use different wood types to age and transform drinks.  
- **Special Effects**: Gain buffs, debuffs, or drunken misfortune—vomiting included!  
- **Roleplay Friendly**: Celebrate with friends or brew your way to greatness in singleplayer.
- **Fun Custom Models and Textures!**: While optional, highly recommended for best experience!

---

## 🍺 Brewing Process  
1. **Ferment**: Drop ingredients like **sugarcane, wheat, or berries** into a water cauldron.  
2. **Distill**: Place the fermented bottle in a cauldron with heat underneath—watch for green particles!  
3. **Age**: Use an **aging barrel** to upgrade drinks. Example: 5-star rum aged in oak becomes **Golden Rum**.

---

**Start brewing now and craft your perfect drink!**  
---

### 🍻 Exclusive Recipes  
Find **MANY MORE DRINKS** near exclusively on our **Discord**!  
[Click here for secret recipes!](https://discord.gg/AVwYs3fqFh)

Added milkshakes in V 2.0.6+ for 1.21.5+! Switch off and mainhand milk+a fully brews base drink to make a milkshake! (eg. milk bucket and rum)
You can see other updates with new drinks in changelog or on discord!
---

## 🍸 Compatibility  
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21+  
- **Multiplayer & Singleplayer**: Works seamlessly on both.  
- **Optional Resource Packs**: Install for custom bottle models! Three options: 2D, 3D or Both(called 4D)!

---

## 🥃 Installation Instructions  
1. Download the datapack.  
2. Place it in your **datapacks folder** inside your world.  
3. (Optional) Add the resource pack for better visuals.  
4. Use `/reload` to activate the datapack.

---
